title: Compaction 工作流程：三步自动压缩
title_en: How Compaction Works: Three Automatic Steps

body.goal: 理解 compaction 的自动触发和执行流程
steps: 检测：API 检测到输入 token 数超过你设置的 trigger threshold（触发阈值）
摘要：API 自动生成当前对话的摘要，提炼关键信息、决策和上下文
替换：用精简的摘要替换旧的对话消息，保留最近的消息不变，然后正常返回 Claude 的回复

body_en.goal: Understand the automatic trigger and execution flow of compaction
steps: Detect: The API detects that input tokens exceed your configured trigger threshold
Summarize: The API automatically generates a summary of the current conversation, extracting key information, decisions, and context
Replace: Old conversation messages are replaced with the concise summary, recent messages are preserved intact, and Claude's response is returned normally
